title: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026, Apply Now , Free Form PDF -
how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website https://www.nbrc.ac.in/newweb/ Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: Administrative officer (Academics), National Brain Research Centre, NH8, Nainwal Mode, Manesar, Haryana 122052 NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026
jobs_info: NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) has issued a notification for the position of Research Associate-I. The recruitment drive comprises one vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 10-06-2026+, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the NBRC Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Ph.D/MD or equivalent degree with at least one research article published in a reputed and indexed journal.
